title: Use "All Done Labels" in Automations

Description
I would like to be able to use “All Done Labels” (as a group) in Automations. 
What are you trying to achieve

posts.author: MaileAnn (Ann)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I would like to be able to use “All Done Labels” (as a group) in Automations.

What are you trying to achieve

This would be particularly helpful for when I do not need to be notified about upcoming deadlines.
